flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: Administration.ChangeMyPassword
NODES=15; EDGES=13
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Account over association AccountPasswordData_Account from AccountPasswordData
3. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action System.VerifyPassword -> OldPasswordOkay
4. DECISION Old password okay? expression=$OldPasswordOkay
5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  6. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  7. END
8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  9. DECISION Passwords equal? expression=$AccountPasswordData/NewPassword = $AccountPasswordData/ConfirmPassword
  10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    11. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The new passwords do not match., type=Error, blocking=true)
    12. END
  13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    14. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Account (Password=$AccountPasswordData/NewPassword; refreshInClient=true)
    15. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The password has been updated., type=Information, blocking=true)
    16. ACTION DeleteAction: delete AccountPasswordData (refreshInClient=false)
    17. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
    18. END

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Nanoflow: Atlas_Web_Content.ACT_Login
NODES=15; EDGES=15
1. START
2. ACTION JavaScriptActionCallAction: call javascript action NanoflowCommons.SignIn -> StatusCode
3. DECISION Response OK? expression=$StatusCode = 200
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change LoginContext (ValidationMessage=''; refreshInClient=true)
  6. END
7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  8. DECISION Network error? expression=$StatusCode = 0
  9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    10. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change LoginContext (ValidationMessage='No connection, please try again later.', Password=''; refreshInClient=true)
    11. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    12. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Abort)
    13. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Abort)
    14. END
  15. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    16. DECISION Unauthorized? expression=$StatusCode = 401
    17. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      18. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change LoginContext (ValidationMessage='The username or password you entered is incorrect.', Password=''; refreshInClient=true)
      19. REF ExclusiveMerge
    20. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      21. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change LoginContext (ValidationMessage='Unknown error occurred.', Password=''; refreshInClient=true)
      22. REF ExclusiveMerge

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ExcelImporter.Column_SetCorrectRefObjectType
NODES=18; EDGES=15
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjects from MxModelReflection.MxObjectType
3. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObject_Ref over association Column_MxObjectType_Reference from Column
4. DECISION already has objecttype? expression=$MxObject_Ref != empty
5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  6. ACTION ListOperationAction: ListOperationAction (output=SelectionIsValid, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  7. DECISION valid? expression=$SelectionIsValid
  8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    9. END
  10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    11. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    12. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=NrOfObjects, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    13. DECISION > 2 expression=$NrOfObjects > 2
    14. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      15. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Column (Column_MxObjectType_Reference=empty; refreshInClient=true)
      16. END
    17. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      18. LOOP iterate MxObjects as Iterator
        19. LOOP BODY
          20. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
          21. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Column (Column_MxObjectType_Reference=$Iterator; refreshInClient=true)
          22. DECISION expression=$Iterator != $StartMxObjectType
      23. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.Ch_SetObjectType_Reference
      24. END
25. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  26. REF ExclusiveMerge

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ExcelImporter.Sub_CreateColumnsFromTemplate
NODES=10; EDGES=8
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjectType over association Template_MxObjectType from Template
3. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable AutoNumberToBeIgnored=MxModelReflection.PrimitiveTypes.AutoNumber
4. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MemberList from MxModelReflection.MxObjectMember
5. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ColumnList over association Column_Template from Template
6. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=NextColNumber, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
7. LOOP iterate MemberList as Member
  8. LOOP BODY
    9. ACTION ListOperationAction: ListOperationAction (output=Column, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    10. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Column (MappingType=ExcelImporter.MappingType.Attribute, FindAttribute=$Member/AttributeName, Column_MxObjectMember=$Member, Column_MxObjectType=$MxObjectType; refreshInClient=false)
    11. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create ExcelImporter.Column as NewColumn (ColNumber=$NextColNumber, Text=$ColumnTitle, Column_Template=$Template)
    12. ACTION ChangeListAction: change ColumnList (type=Add, value=$NewColumn)
    13. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable ColumnTitle=$Member/AttributeName
    14. DECISION found? expression=$Column != empty
    15. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    16. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable NextColNumber=if $NextColNumber = empty then 0 else $NextColNumber + 1
17. ACTION CommitAction: commit ColumnList (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
18. END

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ExcelImporter.ValidateTemplate
NODES=53; EDGES=63
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve UserLanguage over association User_Language from currentUser
3. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable WarningString=''
4. DECISION Has object type expression=$Template/ExcelImporter.Template_MxObjectType != empty
5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  6. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  7. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetAddProperties -> AddProperties
  8. DECISION Has Remove Indicator? expression=$AddProperties/RemoveUnsyncedObjects != empty and $AddProperties/RemoveUnsyncedObjects != ExcelImporter.RemoveIndicator....
  9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    10. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    11. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Columns from ExcelImporter.Column
    12. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable AnyColumnUsed=false
    13. LOOP iterate Columns as ColumnIter
      14. LOOP BODY
        15. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_Col
        16. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_Col
        17. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.SetColumnStatus -> Variable
        18. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
        19. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        20. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change ColumnIter (refreshInClient=true)
        21. DECISION column status invalid? expression=$ColumnIter/Status
        22. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable AnyColumnUsed=true
    23. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve AllKeyColumns from ExcelImporter.Column
    24. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=Count, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    25. DECISION import action expression=$Template/ImportAction
    26. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=(empty)
      27. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
      28. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_ReqField
      29. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_ReqField
      30. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      31. DECISION Show messages expression=$ShowWarningPopup
      32. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        33. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The template is not valid because of the following reason(s): {1}, type=Warning, blocking=true)
        34. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        35. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.SF_Template_CheckNrs -> IsValid_2
        36. END
      37. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        38. REF ExclusiveMerge
    39. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=CreateObjects
      40. DECISION key columns > 0 expression=$Count > 0
      41. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        42. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoKeyAllowed
        43. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoKeyAllowed
        44. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        45. DECISION Any column used? expression=$AnyColumnUsed
        46. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          47. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          48. DECISION has warning message? expression=trim( $WarningString ) != ''
          49. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            50. REF ExclusiveMerge
          51. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            52. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.SF_Template_CheckNrs -> IsValid
            53. END
        54. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          55. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve AllReferences from ExcelImporter.ReferenceHandling
          56. LOOP iterate AllReferences as Reference
            57. LOOP BODY
              58. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
              59. DECISION > 0 expression=$Count_1 > 0
              60. DECISION > 0 expression=$Count_1 > 0
              61. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoRefKey
              62. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
              63. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=Count_1, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
              64. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxReference over association ReferenceHandling_MxObjectReference from Reference
              65. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve KeyColumnsForReference from ExcelImporter.Column
              66. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_HasRefKey
              67. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_HasRefKey
              68. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoRefKey
              69. DECISION Create everything? expression=$Reference/Handling = ExcelImporter.ReferenceHandlingEnum.CreateEverything
          70. REF ExclusiveMerge
      71. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        72. REF ExclusiveMerge
    73. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=SynchronizeOnlyExisting
      74. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      75. DECISION key columns > 0 expression=$Count > 0 or not( $AnyColumnUsed )
      76. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        77. REF ExclusiveMerge
      78. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        79. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoKeyFound
        80. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoKeyFound
        81. REF ExclusiveMerge
    82. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=OnlyCreateNewObjects
      83. DECISION key columns > 0 expression=$Count > 0 or not( $AnyColumnUsed )
      84. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        85. REF ExclusiveMerge
      86. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        87. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoKeyFound_1
        88. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoKeyFound_1
        89. REF ExclusiveMerge
    90. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=SynchronizeObjects
      91. REF ExclusiveMerge
  92. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    93. DECISION Commit Unchanged Objects? expression=$AddProperties/CommitUnchangedObjects_MainObject = true
    94. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      95. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      96. DECISION Remove indicator selected? expression=$AddProperties/ExcelImporter.AdditionalProperties_MxObjectMember_RemoveIndicator != empty
      97. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        98. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        99. REF ExclusiveMerge
      100. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        101. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_Indicator
        102. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_Indicator
        103. REF ExclusiveMerge
    104. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      105. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_CommitUnchObjs
      106. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_CommitUnchObjs
      107. REF ExclusiveMerge
108. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  109. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoTemplateObjectType
  110. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoTemplateObjectType
  111. REF ExclusiveMerge

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ExcelImporter.Validate_TemplateDocument
NODES=13; EDGES=11
1. START
2. DECISION found? expression=$TemplateDocument != empty
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. DECISION has file? expression=$TemplateDocument/Name != empty and $TemplateDocument/Name != ''
  5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    6. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable documentName=toLowerCase($TemplateDocument/Name)
    7. DECISION Ends with '.xls', '.xlsx' or '.xlsm' expression=endsWith($documentName,'.xls') or (endsWith($documentName,'.xlsx')) or endsWith($documentName,'.xlsm')
    8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      9. END
    10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      11. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The uploaded excel file should be of the type .xls,.xlsx or .xlsm, type=Warning, blocking=true)
      12. END
  13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    14. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=There is no excel file uploaded for this template, type=Warning, blocking=true)
    15. END
16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  17. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=There is no excel document found for this template, type=Warning, blocking=true)
  18. END

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Rule: ExcelImporter.ValidateColumn
NODES=44; EDGES=41
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ObjectType over association Column_MxObjectType from Column
3. DECISION expression=$Column/MappingType
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=Reference
  5. DECISION has reference expression=$Column/ExcelImporter.Column_MxObjectReference != empty
  6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    7. END
  8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    9. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Reference from MxModelReflection.MxObjectReference
    10. DECISION valid? expression=$Reference != empty
    11. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      12. END
    13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      14. DECISION has objecttype expression=$Column/ExcelImporter.Column_MxObjectType_Reference != empty
      15. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        16. END
      17. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        18. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ObjectType_Ref from MxModelReflection.MxObjectType
        19. DECISION valid? expression=$Column/ExcelImporter.Column_MxObjectMember_Reference != empty and $ObjectType_Ref != empty
        20. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          21. END
        22. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          23. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Members_Ref from MxModelReflection.MxObjectMember
          24. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=NrOfMembers_Ref, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
          25. DECISION > 0 expression=$NrOfMembers_Ref > 0
          26. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            27. END
          28. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            29. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjectMember_Ref over association Column_MxObjectMember_Reference from Column
            30. DECISION Is the attr an auto number? expression=$MxObjectMember_Ref/AttributeTypeEnum = MxModelReflection.PrimitiveTypes.AutoNumber
            31. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
              32. END
            33. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
              34. DECISION Is attr Key expression=$Column/IsReferenceKey = ExcelImporter.ReferenceKeyType.YesMainAndAssociatedObject or $Column/IsReferenceKey = ExcelImpo...
              35. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                36. DECISION Only search for objects? expression=$Template/ImportAction = ExcelImporter.ImportActions.SynchronizeOnlyExisting
                37. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                  38. END
                39. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                  40. END
              41. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                42. END
43. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=Attribute
  44. DECISION has attribute expression=$Column/ExcelImporter.Column_MxObjectMember != empty
  45. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    46. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MemberList from MxModelReflection.MxObjectMember
    47. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=NrOfMembers, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    48. DECISION > 0 expression=$NrOfMembers > 0

3. ACTION CreateListAction: CreateListAction (output=TransactionList, entity=SmartExpenses.Transaction, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
4. LOOP iterate ImportTransactionList as IteratorImportTransaction
  5. LOOP BODY
    6. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow SmartExpenses.SUB_Transaction_setStatus
    7. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create SmartExpenses.Transaction as Transaction (Transaction_FBGProfile=$FBGProfile, TransactionCode=$IteratorImportTransaction/Transactiereferentie, Name=$IteratorImportTransaction/Tegenpartij, Description=$IteratorImportTransaction/Omschrijving, InOut=if $IteratorImportTransaction/Bedrag >= 0 then SmartExpenses.ENUM_TransactionSort.income else SmartExpenses.ENUM_TransactionSort.expenditure, Value=abs($IteratorImportTransaction/Bedrag), TransactionDate=$IteratorImportTransaction/Datum, EntryDate=[%BeginOfCurrentDay%], +2 more)
    8. ACTION ChangeListAction: change TransactionList (type=Add, value=$Transaction)
    9. ACTION DeleteAction: delete IteratorImportTransaction (refreshInClient=false)
    10. ACTION ChangeListAction: change ImportTransactionList (type=Remove, value=$IteratorImportTransaction)
11. ACTION CommitAction: commit TransactionList (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
12. ACTION CommitAction: commit ImportTransactionList (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
13. END

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: MxModelReflection.BCo_Token
NODES=21; EDGES=19
1. START
2. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Token (CombinedToken=$Token/Prefix + $Token/Token + $Token/Suffix, Description=if $Token/Description = empty or $Token/Description = '' then $Token/Token else $Token/Description; refreshInClient=false)
3. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjectTypeStart over association Token_MxObjectType_Start from Token
4. DECISION Token type expression=$Token/TokenType
5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=Reference
  6. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjectReference over association Token_MxObjectReference from Token
  7. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjectTypeReference over association Token_MxObjectType_Referenced from Token
  8. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MemberReference over association Token_MxObjectMember from Token
  9. DECISION has all associations expression=$MemberReference != empty and $MxObjectReference != empty and $MxObjectTypeStart != empty and $MxObjectTypeReference != ...
  10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    11. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Token (Status=MxModelReflection.Status.Invalid; refreshInClient=false)
    12. END
  13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    14. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Token (Status=MxModelReflection.Status.Valid, MetaModelPath=$MxObjectTypeStart/CompleteName + '/' + $MxObjectReference/CompleteName + '/' + $MxObjectTypeReference/CompleteName + '/' + $MemberReference/AttributeName; refreshInClient=false)
    15. END
16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=Attribute
  17. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Member over association Token_MxObjectMember from Token
  18. DECISION has all associations expression=$Member != empty and $MxObjectTypeStart != empty
  19. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    20. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Token (Status=MxModelReflection.Status.Valid, MetaModelPath=$MxObjectTypeStart/CompleteName + '/' + $Member/AttributeName; refreshInClient=false)
    21. END
  22. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    23. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Token (Status=MxModelReflection.Status.Invalid; refreshInClient=false)
    24. END
25. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=(empty)
  26. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Token (Status=MxModelReflection.Status.Invalid; refreshInClient=false)
  27. END

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: MxModelReflection.IVK_RecalculateSize
NODES=5; EDGES=4
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve DbSizeEstimateList from MxModelReflection.DbSizeEstimate
3. LOOP iterate DbSizeEstimateList as Estimate
  4. LOOP BODY
    5. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjectMemberList from MxModelReflection.MxObjectMember
    6. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=count, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    7. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Estimate (CalculatedSizeInBytes=$Size, CalculatedSizeInKiloBytes=ceil($Size : 1024); refreshInClient=false)
    8. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Size=8 + $count
    9. LOOP iterate MxObjectMemberList as Member
      10. LOOP BODY
        11. DECISION expression=$ValueType/TypeEnum
        12. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 1
        13. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
        14. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 8
        15. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        16. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 2+( ceil(if $Member/FieldLength != empty then $Member/FieldLength * 0.8 else 200) *2)
        17. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        18. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 2+(20*2)
        19. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 2+(68*2)
        20. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 36
        21. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow MxModelReflection.Log -> LogProduct
        22. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ValueType over association MxObjectMember_Type from Member
        23. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 4
        24. DECISION has owner or changed by expression=contains( toLowerCase($Member/CompleteName), 'owner') or contains( toLowerCase($Member/CompleteName), 'changedby')
        25. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + ceil($LogProduct:8 )
        26. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        27. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 8
28. ACTION CommitAction: commit DbSizeEstimateList (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
29. END

flows.pseudocode:

NODES=3; EDGES=2

2. ACTION CommitAction: commit Module (refreshInClient=false, withEvents=false)

FLOW Microflow: MxModelReflection.Log
NODES=10; EDGES=8
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Product=1
3. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Comparator=$Base
4. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
5. DECISION Comparator = x expression=$Comparator >= $x
6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  7. END
8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  9. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Comparator=$Comparator * $Base
  10. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Comparator=$Comparator * $Base
  11. GOTO ExclusiveMerge // cycle

flows.pseudocode:

NODES=18; EDGES=14
1. START
2. DECISION expression=$MxObjectReference/ReferenceType
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=Reference
  4. DECISION has startpoint expression=$MxObjectType_StartPoint != empty
  5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    6. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjectTypeList over association MxObjectReference_MxObjectType_Parent from MxObjectReference
    7. ACTION ListOperationAction: ListOperationAction (output=IsMxObjectEndpointInParent, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    8. DECISION Is endpoint parent? expression=$IsMxObjectEndpointInParent
    9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      10. END
    11. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      12. END
  13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    14. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjectTypeList_Child over association MxObjectReference_MxObjectType_Child from MxObjectReference
    15. ACTION ListOperationAction: ListOperationAction (output=IsMxObjectStartpointInChild, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    16. DECISION Is Startpoint in child expression=$IsMxObjectStartpointInChild
    17. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      18. END
    19. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      20. END
21. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=ReferenceSet
  22. END
23. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=(empty)
  24. END

FLOW Microflow: SmartExpenses.DS_BudgetTerm_New
NODES=11; EDGES=6
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve BudgetTermList from SmartExpenses.BudgetTerm

ACTION CreateObjectAction: create SmartExpenses.BudgetTerm as NewBudgetTerm (BudgetTerm_BudgetType=$BudgetType, Name=if ($BudgetType/Interval = SmartExpenses.ENUM_BudgetInterval.Week) then 'weekbudget' else if ($BudgetType/Interval = SmartExpenses.ENUM_BudgetInterval.Month) then formatDateTime($D..., BudgetAmount=$OldBudgetTerm/BudgetAmount, StartDate=if ($BudgetType/Interval = SmartExpenses.ENUM_BudgetInterval.Week) then beginOfWeek($Date) else if ($BudgetType/Interval = SmartExpenses.ENUM_BudgetInterval.Month) then beginOfMont..., EndDate=if ($BudgetType/Interval = SmartExpenses.ENUM_BudgetInterval.Week) then endOfWeek($Date) else if ($BudgetType/Interval = SmartExpenses.ENUM_BudgetInterval.Month) then endOfMonth($D...)
  7. END
8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  9. END

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: SmartExpenses.VAL_BudgetTypeTerm_New
NODES=21; EDGES=21
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable IsValid=true
3. DECISION Is Naam not empty? expression=trim($BudgetType/Name) != ''
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  6. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback=''
  7. DECISION Is Hoeveelheid not empty? expression=$BudgetTerm/BudgetAmount != empty
  8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    9. DECISION Is Hoeveelheid greater than 0? expression=$BudgetTerm/BudgetAmount > -0.01
    10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      11. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      12. DECISION expression=trim($BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback) = ''
      13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        14. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        15. END
      16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        17. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
        18. REF ExclusiveMerge
    19. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      20. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
      21. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback=if trim($BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback) = '' then 'Hoeveelheid mag niet lager zijn dan 0' else $BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback + ' ' + 'Hoeveelheid mag niet lager zijn dan 0'
      22. REF ExclusiveMerge
  23. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    24. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
    25. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback=$BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback + 'Vul een hoeveelheid in'
    26. REF ExclusiveMerge
27. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  28. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
  29. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  30. REF ExclusiveMerge

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: SmartExpenses.VAL_Transaction_NewEdit
NODES=28; EDGES=31
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable IsValid=true
3. DECISION Is Naam not empty? expression=trim($Transaction/Name) != ''
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  6. DECISION Is Waarde not empty? expression=$Transaction/InOut != empty
  7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    8. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    9. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable ValueValidationFeedback=''
    10. DECISION Is € not empty? expression=$Transaction/Value != empty
    11. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      12. DECISION Is € greater than 0? expression=$Transaction/Value > 0
      13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        14. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        15. DECISION expression=trim($ValueValidationFeedback) = ''
        16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          17. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          18. DECISION Is Dag van transactie not empty? expression=$Transaction/TransactionDate != empty
          19. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            20. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
            21. END
          22. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            23. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
            24. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
            25. REF ExclusiveMerge
        26. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          27. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
          28. REF ExclusiveMerge
      29. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        30. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
        31. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable ValueValidationFeedback=if trim($ValueValidationFeedback) = '' then 'De waarde mag niet negatief zijn' else $ValueValidationFeedback + ' ' + 'De waarde mag niet negatief zijn'
        32. REF ExclusiveMerge
    33. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      34. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
      35. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable ValueValidationFeedback=$ValueValidationFeedback + 'Vul een waarde in'
      36. REF ExclusiveMerge
  37. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    38. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
    39. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    40. REF ExclusiveMerge
41. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  42. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
  43. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  44. REF ExclusiveMerge

FLOW Microflow: WorkflowCommons.ACT_Workflow_WithdrawConfirmation
NODES=17; EDGES=16
1. START
2. DECISION Comment filled? expression=$WorkflowComment/Content != empty and length(trim($WorkflowComment/Content)) > 0
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. ACTION CommitAction: commit WorkflowComment (refreshInClient=false, withEvents=true)
  5. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  6. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Workflow over association WorkflowComment_Workflow from WorkflowComment
  7. DECISION Found? expression=$Workflow != empty
  8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    9. ACTION WorkflowOperationAction: WorkflowOperationAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    10. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve WorkflowViewList over association WorkflowView_Workflow from Workflow
    11. ACTION ListOperationAction: ListOperationAction (output=WorkflowView, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    12. DECISION Found? expression=$WorkflowView != empty
    13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      14. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change WorkflowView (State=$Workflow/State, Reason=$Workflow/Reason, EndTime=$Workflow/EndTime; refreshInClient=true)
      15. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      16. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
      17. END
    18. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      19. REF ExclusiveMerge
  20. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    21. END
22. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  23. REF ExclusiveMerge

9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  10. ACTION LogMessageAction: LogMessageAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  11. END

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: WorkflowCommons.SUB_CleanupHelper_Validate
NODES=14; EDGES=16
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable IsValid=true
3. DECISION Start Dates expression=$CleanupHelper/StartDateStart != empty and $CleanupHelper/StartDateEnd != empty
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  5. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  6. DECISION End Dates expression=$CleanupHelper/EndDateStart != empty and $CleanupHelper/EndDateEnd != empty
  7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    8. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    9. END
  10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    11. DECISION expression=$CleanupHelper/EndDateStart < $CleanupHelper/EndDateEnd
    12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      13. REF ExclusiveMerge
    14. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      15. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
      16. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
      17. REF ExclusiveMerge
18. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  19. DECISION expression=$CleanupHelper/StartDateStart < $CleanupHelper/StartDateEnd
  20. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    21. REF ExclusiveMerge
  22. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    23. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    24. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
    25. REF ExclusiveMerge

ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change AuditTrailViewer (Configuration='{ "name": "dataGrid2_auditTrail", "schemaVersion": 2, "settingsHash": "4081041333", "columns": [ { "columnId": "0", "hidden": false }, { "columnId": "1", "hidden": false }, { "col..., ActiveView=WorkflowCommons.Enum_AuditTrail_View._Default; refreshInClient=true)
3. END

FLOW Nanoflow: WorkflowCommons.SUB_Duration_Calculate
NODES=20; EDGES=17
1. START
2. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create WorkflowCommons.DurationHelper as NewDurationHelper (Duration=empty)
3. DECISION Start? expression=$StartTime != empty
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. DECISION End? expression=$EndTime != empty
  6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    7. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable DurationInSeconds=ceil(secondsBetween($StartTime, $EndTime))
    8. DECISION Minutes? expression=$DurationInSeconds > 60
    9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      10. DECISION Hours? expression=$DurationInSeconds > (60 * 60)
      11. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        12. DECISION Days? expression=$DurationInSeconds > (60 * 60 * 24)
        13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          14. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change NewDurationHelper (Duration=ceil($DurationInSeconds div (60 * 60 * 24)) + ' ' + getCaption(WorkflowCommons.Enum_DurationUnit.Days); refreshInClient=true)
          15. END
        16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          17. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change NewDurationHelper (Duration=ceil($DurationInSeconds div (60 * 60)) + ' ' + getCaption(WorkflowCommons.Enum_DurationUnit.Hours); refreshInClient=true)
          18. END
      19. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        20. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change NewDurationHelper (Duration=ceil($DurationInSeconds div 60) + ' ' + getCaption(WorkflowCommons.Enum_DurationUnit.Minutes); refreshInClient=true)
        21. END
    22. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      23. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change NewDurationHelper (Duration=$DurationInSeconds + ' ' + getCaption(WorkflowCommons.Enum_DurationUnit.Seconds); refreshInClient=true)
      24. END
  25. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    26. END
27. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  28. END

# Module: Administration
Entities: 2, Associations: 1, Enumerations: 0
Flows: 8

## Domain Model
- ENTITY Administration.Account (persistent, generalization=System.User)
  - ATTR Email: StringAttributeType
  - ATTR FullName: StringAttributeType
  - ATTR IsLocalUser: BooleanAttributeType
- ENTITY Administration.AccountPasswordData (non-persistent)
  - ATTR ConfirmPassword: StringAttributeType
  - ATTR NewPassword: StringAttributeType
  - ATTR OldPassword: StringAttributeType
- ASSOC Administration.AccountPasswordData_Account: Administration.AccountPasswordData [*-1] Administration.Account

## Flows

FLOW Microflow: Administration.ChangeMyPassword
NODES=15; EDGES=13
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Account over association AccountPasswordData_Account from AccountPasswordData
3. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action System.VerifyPassword -> OldPasswordOkay
4. DECISION Old password okay? expression=$OldPasswordOkay
5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  6. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  7. END
8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  9. DECISION Passwords equal? expression=$AccountPasswordData/NewPassword = $AccountPasswordData/ConfirmPassword
  10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    11. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The new passwords do not match., type=Error, blocking=true)
    12. END
  13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    14. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Account (Password=$AccountPasswordData/NewPassword; refreshInClient=true)
    15. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The password has been updated., type=Information, blocking=true)
    16. ACTION DeleteAction: delete AccountPasswordData (refreshInClient=false)
    17. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
    18. END

FLOW Microflow: Administration.ChangePassword
NODES=11; EDGES=9
1. START
2. DECISION Passwords equal? expression=$AccountPasswordData/NewPassword = $AccountPasswordData/ConfirmPassword
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  4. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The new passwords do not match., type=Error, blocking=true)
  5. END
6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  7. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Account over association AccountPasswordData_Account from AccountPasswordData
  8. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Account (Password=$AccountPasswordData/NewPassword; refreshInClient=true)
  9. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The password has been updated., type=Information, blocking=true)
  10. ACTION DeleteAction: delete AccountPasswordData (refreshInClient=false)
  11. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
  12. END

FLOW Microflow: Administration.ManageMyAccount
NODES=8; EDGES=8
1. START
2. DECISION split currentUser
3. BRANCH when InheritanceCase=Administration.Account
  4. ACTION CastAction: CastAction (output=Account, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  5. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page Administration.MyAccount
  6. END
7. BRANCH when InheritanceCase=System.User
  8. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  9. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=No account information is available for anonymous users., type=Information, blocking=true)
  10. END
11. BRANCH when InheritanceCase
  12. REF ExclusiveMerge

FLOW Microflow: Administration.NewAccount
NODES=5; EDGES=4
1. START
2. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create Administration.Account as NewAccount
3. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create Administration.AccountPasswordData as AccountPasswordData (AccountPasswordData_Account=$NewAccount)
4. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page Administration.Account_New
5. END

FLOW Microflow: Administration.NewWebServiceAccount
NODES=6; EDGES=5
1. START
2. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create Administration.Account as NewAccount
3. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change NewAccount (WebServiceUser=true; refreshInClient=false)
4. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create Administration.AccountPasswordData as AccountPasswordData (AccountPasswordData_Account=$NewAccount)
5. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page Administration.Account_New
6. END

FLOW Microflow: Administration.SaveNewAccount
NODES=11; EDGES=9
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Account over association AccountPasswordData_Account from AccountPasswordData
3. DECISION Passwords equal? expression=$AccountPasswordData/NewPassword = $AccountPasswordData/ConfirmPassword
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  5. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The entered passwords do not match., type=Error, blocking=true)
  6. END
7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  8. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Account (Password=$AccountPasswordData/NewPassword; refreshInClient=true)
  9. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create SmartExpenses.FBGProfile as FBGEnvironment (FBGProfile_Account=$Account)
  10. ACTION DeleteAction: delete AccountPasswordData (refreshInClient=false)
  11. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
  12. END

FLOW Microflow: Administration.ShowMyPasswordForm
NODES=5; EDGES=3
1. START
2. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create Administration.AccountPasswordData as AccountPasswordData (AccountPasswordData_Account=$Account)
3. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page Administration.ChangeMyPasswordForm
4. END

FLOW Microflow: Administration.ShowPasswordForm
NODES=5; EDGES=3
1. START
2. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create Administration.AccountPasswordData as AccountPasswordData (AccountPasswordData_Account=$Account)
3. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page Administration.ChangePasswordForm
4. END

# Module: Atlas_Web_Content
Entities: 1, Associations: 0, Enumerations: 0
Flows: 2

## Domain Model
- ENTITY Atlas_Web_Content.LoginContext (non-persistent)
  - ATTR Password: StringAttributeType
  - ATTR RememberMe: BooleanAttributeType
  - ATTR Username: StringAttributeType
  - ATTR ValidationMessage: StringAttributeType

## Flows

FLOW Nanoflow: Atlas_Web_Content.ACT_Login
NODES=15; EDGES=15
1. START
2. ACTION JavaScriptActionCallAction: call javascript action NanoflowCommons.SignIn -> StatusCode
3. DECISION Response OK? expression=$StatusCode = 200
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change LoginContext (ValidationMessage=''; refreshInClient=true)
  6. END
7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  8. DECISION Network error? expression=$StatusCode = 0
  9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    10. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change LoginContext (ValidationMessage='No connection, please try again later.', Password=''; refreshInClient=true)
    11. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    12. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Abort)
    13. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Abort)
    14. END
  15. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false

FLOW Microflow: ExcelImporter.Sub_CreateColumnsFromTemplate
NODES=10; EDGES=8
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjectType over association Template_MxObjectType from Template
3. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable AutoNumberToBeIgnored=MxModelReflection.PrimitiveTypes.AutoNumber
4. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MemberList from MxModelReflection.MxObjectMember
5. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ColumnList over association Column_Template from Template
6. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=NextColNumber, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
7. LOOP iterate MemberList as Member
  8. LOOP BODY
    9. ACTION ListOperationAction: ListOperationAction (output=Column, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    10. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Column (MappingType=ExcelImporter.MappingType.Attribute, FindAttribute=$Member/AttributeName, Column_MxObjectMember=$Member, Column_MxObjectType=$MxObjectType; refreshInClient=false)
    11. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create ExcelImporter.Column as NewColumn (ColNumber=$NextColNumber, Text=$ColumnTitle, Column_Template=$Template)
    12. ACTION ChangeListAction: change ColumnList (type=Add, value=$NewColumn)
    13. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable ColumnTitle=$Member/AttributeName
    14. DECISION found? expression=$Column != empty
    15. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    16. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable NextColNumber=if $NextColNumber = empty then 0 else $NextColNumber + 1
17. ACTION CommitAction: commit ColumnList (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
18. END

FLOW Microflow: ExcelImporter.ValidateTemplate
NODES=53; EDGES=63
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve UserLanguage over association User_Language from currentUser
3. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable WarningString=''
4. DECISION Has object type expression=$Template/ExcelImporter.Template_MxObjectType != empty
5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  6. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  7. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetAddProperties -> AddProperties
  8. DECISION Has Remove Indicator? expression=$AddProperties/RemoveUnsyncedObjects != empty and $AddProperties/RemoveUnsyncedObjects != ExcelImporter.RemoveIndicator....
  9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    10. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    11. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Columns from ExcelImporter.Column
    12. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable AnyColumnUsed=false
    13. LOOP iterate Columns as ColumnIter
      14. LOOP BODY
        15. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_Col
        16. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_Col
        17. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.SetColumnStatus -> Variable
        18. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
        19. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        20. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change ColumnIter (refreshInClient=true)
        21. DECISION column status invalid? expression=$ColumnIter/Status
        22. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable AnyColumnUsed=true
    23. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve AllKeyColumns from ExcelImporter.Column
    24. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=Count, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    25. DECISION import action expression=$Template/ImportAction
    26. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=(empty)
      27. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
      28. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_ReqField
      29. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_ReqField
      30. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      31. DECISION Show messages expression=$ShowWarningPopup
      32. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        33. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The template is not valid because of the following reason(s): {1}, type=Warning, blocking=true)
        34. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        35. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.SF_Template_CheckNrs -> IsValid_2
        36. END
      37. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        38. REF ExclusiveMerge
    39. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=CreateObjects
      40. DECISION key columns > 0 expression=$Count > 0
      41. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        42. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoKeyAllowed
        43. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoKeyAllowed
        44. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        45. DECISION Any column used? expression=$AnyColumnUsed
        46. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          47. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          48. DECISION has warning message? expression=trim( $WarningString ) != ''
          49. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            50. REF ExclusiveMerge
          51. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            52. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.SF_Template_CheckNrs -> IsValid
            53. END
        54. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          55. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve AllReferences from ExcelImporter.ReferenceHandling
          56. LOOP iterate AllReferences as Reference
            57. LOOP BODY
              58. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
              59. DECISION > 0 expression=$Count_1 > 0
              60. DECISION > 0 expression=$Count_1 > 0
              61. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoRefKey
              62. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
              63. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=Count_1, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
              64. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxReference over association ReferenceHandling_MxObjectReference from Reference
              65. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve KeyColumnsForReference from ExcelImporter.Column
              66. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_HasRefKey
              67. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_HasRefKey
              68. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoRefKey
              69. DECISION Create everything? expression=$Reference/Handling = ExcelImporter.ReferenceHandlingEnum.CreateEverything
          70. REF ExclusiveMerge
      71. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        72. REF ExclusiveMerge
    73. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=SynchronizeOnlyExisting
      74. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      75. DECISION key columns > 0 expression=$Count > 0 or not( $AnyColumnUsed )
      76. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        77. REF ExclusiveMerge
      78. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        79. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoKeyFound
        80. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoKeyFound
        81. REF ExclusiveMerge
    82. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=OnlyCreateNewObjects
      83. DECISION key columns > 0 expression=$Count > 0 or not( $AnyColumnUsed )
      84. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        85. REF ExclusiveMerge
      86. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        87. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoKeyFound_1
        88. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoKeyFound_1
        89. REF ExclusiveMerge
    90. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=SynchronizeObjects
      91. REF ExclusiveMerge
  92. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    93. DECISION Commit Unchanged Objects? expression=$AddProperties/CommitUnchangedObjects_MainObject = true
    94. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      95. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      96. DECISION Remove indicator selected? expression=$AddProperties/ExcelImporter.AdditionalProperties_MxObjectMember_RemoveIndicator != empty
      97. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        98. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        99. REF ExclusiveMerge
      100. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        101. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_Indicator
        102. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_Indicator
        103. REF ExclusiveMerge
    104. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      105. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_CommitUnchObjs
      106. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_CommitUnchObjs
      107. REF ExclusiveMerge
108. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  109. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoTemplateObjectType
  110. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoTemplateObjectType
  111. REF ExclusiveMerge

FLOW Microflow: ExcelImporter.Validate_TemplateDocument
NODES=13; EDGES=11
1. START
2. DECISION found? expression=$TemplateDocument != empty
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. DECISION has file? expression=$TemplateDocument/Name != empty and $TemplateDocument/Name != ''
  5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    6. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable documentName=toLowerCase($TemplateDocument/Name)
    7. DECISION Ends with '.xls', '.xlsx' or '.xlsm' expression=endsWith($documentName,'.xls') or (endsWith($documentName,'.xlsx')) or endsWith($documentName,'.xlsm')
    8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      9. END
    10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      11. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The uploaded excel file should be of the type .xls,.xlsx or .xlsm, type=Warning, blocking=true)
      12. END
  13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    14. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=There is no excel file uploaded for this template, type=Warning, blocking=true)
    15. END
16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  17. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=There is no excel document found for this template, type=Warning, blocking=true)
  18. END

        18. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ObjectType_Ref from MxModelReflection.MxObjectType

            33. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true

  13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true

  18. DECISION has all associations expression=$Member != empty and $MxObjectTypeStart != empty
  19. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    20. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Token (Status=MxModelReflection.Status.Valid, MetaModelPath=$MxObjectTypeStart/CompleteName + '/' + $Member/AttributeName; refreshInClient=false)

  22. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false

    24. END
25. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=(empty)

FLOW Microflow: MxModelReflection.IVK_RecalculateSize
NODES=5; EDGES=4
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve DbSizeEstimateList from MxModelReflection.DbSizeEstimate
3. LOOP iterate DbSizeEstimateList as Estimate
  4. LOOP BODY
    5. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxObjectMemberList from MxModelReflection.MxObjectMember
    6. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=count, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    7. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Estimate (CalculatedSizeInBytes=$Size, CalculatedSizeInKiloBytes=ceil($Size : 1024); refreshInClient=false)
    8. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Size=8 + $count
    9. LOOP iterate MxObjectMemberList as Member
      10. LOOP BODY
        11. DECISION expression=$ValueType/TypeEnum
        12. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 1
        13. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
        14. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 8
        15. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        16. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 2+( ceil(if $Member/FieldLength != empty then $Member/FieldLength * 0.8 else 200) *2)
        17. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        18. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 2+(20*2)
        19. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 2+(68*2)
        20. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 36
        21. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow MxModelReflection.Log -> LogProduct
        22. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ValueType over association MxObjectMember_Type from Member
        23. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 4
        24. DECISION has owner or changed by expression=contains( toLowerCase($Member/CompleteName), 'owner') or contains( toLowerCase($Member/CompleteName), 'changedby')
        25. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + ceil($LogProduct:8 )
        26. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        27. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Size=$Size + 8
28. ACTION CommitAction: commit DbSizeEstimateList (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
29. END

NODES=10; EDGES=8
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Product=1
3. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Comparator=$Base
4. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
5. DECISION Comparator = x expression=$Comparator >= $x
6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  7. END
8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  9. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Comparator=$Comparator * $Base
  10. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Comparator=$Comparator * $Base
  11. GOTO ExclusiveMerge // cycle

  - ATTR TransactionDate: DateTimeAttributeType
  - ATTR Value: DecimalAttributeType
- ASSOC SmartExpenses.Balance_FBGProfile: SmartExpenses.Balance [*-1] SmartExpenses.FBGProfile
- ASSOC SmartExpenses.BudgetTerm_BudgetType: SmartExpenses.BudgetTerm [*-1] SmartExpenses.BudgetType

- ASSOC SmartExpenses.BulkEditHelper_BudgetTerm: SmartExpenses.BulkEditHelper [*-1] SmartExpenses.BudgetTerm
- ASSOC SmartExpenses.BulkEditHelper_Transaction: SmartExpenses.BulkEditHelper [*-*] SmartExpenses.Transaction
- ASSOC SmartExpenses.DateHelper_FBGProfile: SmartExpenses.DateHelper [*-1] SmartExpenses.FBGProfile
- ASSOC SmartExpenses.Logo_BudgetType: SmartExpenses.Logo [1-1] SmartExpenses.BudgetType

FLOW Microflow: SmartExpenses.ACR_FBGProfile_setStandardBudgets
NODES=10; EDGES=7
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve StandardBudgetsList from SmartExpenses.StandardBudget

4. ACTION CreateListAction: CreateListAction (output=BudgetTermList, entity=SmartExpenses.BudgetTerm, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
5. LOOP iterate StandardBudgetsList as IteratorStandardBudgets
  6. LOOP BODY
    7. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create SmartExpenses.BudgetType as NewBudgetType (Name=$IteratorStandardBudgets/Name, Description=$IteratorStandardBudgets/Description, Interval=$IteratorStandardBudgets/Interval, BudgetType_FBGProfile=$FBGProfile, Logo_BudgetType=$IteratorStandardBudgets/SmartExpenses.Logo_StandardBudget)
    8. ACTION ChangeListAction: change CurrentBudgetTypeList (type=Add, value=$NewBudgetType)
    9. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow SmartExpenses.DS_BudgetTerm_New -> BudgetTerm
    10. ACTION ChangeListAction: change BudgetTermList (type=Add, value=$BudgetTerm)
11. ACTION CommitAction: commit CurrentBudgetTypeList (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
12. ACTION CommitAction: commit BudgetTermList (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
13. END

FLOW Microflow: SmartExpenses.ACT_BudgetTerm_BudgetType_Edit
NODES=12; EDGES=11

4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. DECISION logo object excist? expression=$BudgetType/SmartExpenses.Logo_BudgetType/SmartExpenses.Logo != empty

FLOW Microflow: SmartExpenses.VAL_BudgetTypeTerm_New
NODES=21; EDGES=21
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable IsValid=true
3. DECISION Is Naam not empty? expression=trim($BudgetType/Name) != ''
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge

  7. DECISION Is Hoeveelheid not empty? expression=$BudgetTerm/BudgetAmount != empty
  8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    9. DECISION Is Hoeveelheid greater than 0? expression=$BudgetTerm/BudgetAmount > -0.01
    10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      11. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      12. DECISION expression=trim($BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback) = ''
      13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        14. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        15. END
      16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        17. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
        18. REF ExclusiveMerge
    19. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      20. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
      21. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback=if trim($BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback) = '' then 'Hoeveelheid mag niet lager zijn dan 0' else $BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback + ' ' + 'Hoeveelheid mag niet lager zijn dan 0'
      22. REF ExclusiveMerge
  23. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    24. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
    25. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback=$BudgetTerm_BudgetAmountValidationFeedback + 'Vul een hoeveelheid in'
    26. REF ExclusiveMerge
27. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  28. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
  29. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  30. REF ExclusiveMerge

FLOW Microflow: SmartExpenses.VAL_Transaction_NewEdit
NODES=28; EDGES=31
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable IsValid=true
3. DECISION Is Naam not empty? expression=trim($Transaction/Name) != ''
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  6. DECISION Is Waarde not empty? expression=$Transaction/InOut != empty
  7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    8. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    9. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable ValueValidationFeedback=''
    10. DECISION Is € not empty? expression=$Transaction/Value != empty

        26. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false

          28. REF ExclusiveMerge
      29. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        30. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
        31. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable ValueValidationFeedback=if trim($ValueValidationFeedback) = '' then 'De waarde mag niet negatief zijn' else $ValueValidationFeedback + ' ' + 'De waarde mag niet negatief zijn'
        32. REF ExclusiveMerge
    33. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      34. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
      35. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable ValueValidationFeedback=$ValueValidationFeedback + 'Vul een waarde in'
      36. REF ExclusiveMerge
  37. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    38. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
    39. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    40. REF ExclusiveMerge
41. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  42. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable IsValid=false
  43. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  44. REF ExclusiveMerge

FLOW Microflow: WorkflowCommons.ACT_Assignee_Migrate
NODES=5; EDGES=4
1. START
2. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow WorkflowCommons.SUB_Configuration_FindOrCreate -> Configuration
3. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow WorkflowCommons.SUB_Assignee_Migrate -> TotalCount
4. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Successfully migrated {1} assignees., type=Information, blocking=true)
5. END

FLOW Microflow: WorkflowCommons.ACT_Attachment_Create
NODES=5; EDGES=3
1. START

3. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page WorkflowCommons.WorkflowAttachment_New
4. END

FLOW Microflow: WorkflowCommons.ACT_Attachment_Download
NODES=4; EDGES=2

2. ACTION DownloadFileAction: DownloadFileAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
3. END

FLOW Microflow: WorkflowCommons.ACT_Attachment_Save
NODES=14; EDGES=12
1. START
2. DECISION Has content? expression=$WorkflowAttachment/HasContents
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve WorkflowComment over association WorkflowAttachment_WorkflowComment from WorkflowAttachment
  5. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve WorkflowView over association WorkflowComment_WorkflowView from WorkflowComment
  6. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow WorkflowCommons.SUB_WorkflowView_CommentAttachment_Validate -> Valid
  7. DECISION Valid? expression=$Valid
  8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    9. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
    10. ACTION CommitAction: commit WorkflowAttachment (refreshInClient=true, withEvents=true)
    11. END
  12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    13. ACTION DeleteAction: delete WorkflowAttachment (refreshInClient=true)
    14. END
15. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  16. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Please upload an attachment., type=Warning, blocking=true)
  17. END

NODES=8; EDGES=6

2. DECISION Has content? expression=$WorkflowAttachment/HasContents
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page

7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false

  9. END

FLOW Microflow: WorkflowCommons.ACT_WorkflowCommentHelper_Edit_Save

  5. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve WorkflowView over association WorkflowComment_WorkflowView from WorkflowComment
  6. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow WorkflowCommons.SUB_WorkflowView_CommentAttachment_Validate -> Valid
  7. DECISION Valid? expression=$Valid
  8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true

    10. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
    11. END
  12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    13. END
14. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  15. END

3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow WorkflowCommons.SUB_WorkflowView_CommentAttachment_Validate -> Valid
  5. DECISION Valid? expression=$Valid
  6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true

    8. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change WorkflowCommentHelper (Content=empty; refreshInClient=false)

12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  13. END

FLOW Microflow: WorkflowCommons.ACT_WorkflowDefinition_Delete
NODES=13; EDGES=11
1. START
2. DECISION Obsolete? expression=$WorkflowDefinition/IsObsolete
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve WorkflowList from System.Workflow
  5. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=WorkflowCount, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  6. DECISION = 0 expression=$WorkflowCount = 0
  7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    8. ACTION DeleteAction: delete WorkflowDefinition (refreshInClient=true)
    9. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
    10. END
  11. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    12. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=This workflow definition still has instances. Use the clean-up instances function to delet..., type=Error, blocking=true)
    13. END
14. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  15. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=You can only delete a workflow definition when it is obsolete., type=Information, blocking=true)
  16. END

FLOW Microflow: WorkflowCommons.ACT_WorkflowDefinition_Lock
NODES=10; EDGES=9
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve WorkflowDefinition over association WorkflowDefinitionHelper_WorkflowDefinition from WorkflowDefinitionHelper
3. DECISION Pause instances? expression=$WorkflowDefinitionHelper/UpdateInstances
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  5. ACTION LockWorkflowAction: LockWorkflowAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  6. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  7. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
  8. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page WorkflowCommons.WorkflowDefinition_ActionConfirmation
  9. END
10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  11. ACTION LockWorkflowAction: LockWorkflowAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  12. REF ExclusiveMerge

FLOW Microflow: WorkflowCommons.ACT_WorkflowDefinition_Unlock
NODES=10; EDGES=9
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve WorkflowDefinition over association WorkflowDefinitionHelper_WorkflowDefinition from WorkflowDefinitionHelper
3. DECISION Resume instances? expression=$WorkflowDefinitionHelper/UpdateInstances
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  5. ACTION UnlockWorkflowAction: UnlockWorkflowAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  6. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  7. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
  8. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page WorkflowCommons.WorkflowDefinition_ActionConfirmation
  9. END
10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  11. ACTION UnlockWorkflowAction: UnlockWorkflowAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  12. REF ExclusiveMerge

FLOW Nanoflow: WorkflowCommons.SUB_Duration_Calculate
NODES=20; EDGES=17
1. START
2. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create WorkflowCommons.DurationHelper as NewDurationHelper (Duration=empty)
3. DECISION Start? expression=$StartTime != empty
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. DECISION End? expression=$EndTime != empty
  6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    7. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable DurationInSeconds=ceil(secondsBetween($StartTime, $EndTime))
    8. DECISION Minutes? expression=$DurationInSeconds > 60
    9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      10. DECISION Hours? expression=$DurationInSeconds > (60 * 60)
      11. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        12. DECISION Days? expression=$DurationInSeconds > (60 * 60 * 24)
        13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          14. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change NewDurationHelper (Duration=ceil($DurationInSeconds div (60 * 60 * 24)) + ' ' + getCaption(WorkflowCommons.Enum_DurationUnit.Days); refreshInClient=true)
          15. END
        16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          17. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change NewDurationHelper (Duration=ceil($DurationInSeconds div (60 * 60)) + ' ' + getCaption(WorkflowCommons.Enum_DurationUnit.Hours); refreshInClient=true)
          18. END
      19. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        20. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change NewDurationHelper (Duration=ceil($DurationInSeconds div 60) + ' ' + getCaption(WorkflowCommons.Enum_DurationUnit.Minutes); refreshInClient=true)
        21. END
    22. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      23. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change NewDurationHelper (Duration=$DurationInSeconds + ' ' + getCaption(WorkflowCommons.Enum_DurationUnit.Seconds); refreshInClient=true)
      24. END
  25. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    26. END
27. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  28. END
